title: senecio irgangii
intro: Senecio irgangii, also known as Irgang's ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine due to its rich content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have shown potential medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and its health benefits may include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, Senecio irgangii is often used in infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
